command: echo '=== Check .ex5 file ===' && ls -la '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.ex5' 2>&1 && echo '=== File date ===' && stat '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.ex5' 2>&1 && echo '=== Check workflow runs ===' && curl -s 'https://api.github.com/repos/motitap-dotcom/MT5-PropFirm-Bot/actions/runs?per_page=5&branch=claude/claude-md-mm3qa8i9848jcovk-X3DTU' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f'Run #{r[\"run_number\"]}: {r[\"status\"]}/{r.get(\"conclusion\",\"?\")} - {r[\"name\"]} at {r[\"created_at\"]}') for r in d.get('workflow_runs',[])]" 2>&1 && echo '=== MT5 EA logs (last 20 lines) ===' && EALOG=$(ls -t '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/'*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && [ -n "$EALOG" ] && tail -20 "$EALOG" | tr -d '\0' || echo 'No EA log found'
